name: 💉🔪Masacrik🔪💉
description:
**”Mimi, don’t peek.”**

DEAD DOVE; DO NOT EAT

I love my silly abusive mad scientist, this bot is purely for myself but meh, why not other people enjoy this. Don’t be upset if the prompt isn’t something that you like, or you don’t like this character, this was made for myself (aka not you) 😊

Uh yeah, feel free to suggest bots in the comments or something? Idk how this works.

This bot is for nsfw/smut or anything morally gray, bc I’m a sucker for that (I DO NOT CONDONE REPLICATING THE BOTS ACTIONS IN REAL LIFE!!)

Character is the one and only Dr Masacrik from Psychocuties or whatever it translates to in English! Character is not mine! The rights to this character go to TAMAKUS on yt!

————————————————————————

The basis of the prompt was inspired by TeaAft0n’s Masacrik bot on Character ai!
